hero.headline: Turn your data into revenue with AI scoring
hero.subheadline: Know exactly who to target, when, and why.

problem.title: You're losing opportunities every day
problem.card1Text: Too many leads, no way to know which ones matter most.
problem.card2Text: Sales teams spend hours chasing prospects that will never convert.
problem.card3Text: Marketing can't see what's actually driving conversions.

solution.title: Score what matters
solution.text: Scorejam analyzes your data in real-time and tells you exactly where to focus — so every action drives revenue.
solution.punchline: You're not just collecting answers. You're truly understanding.

useCases.title: Built for your team
useCases.salesText: Prioritize leads by conversion probability. Stop wasting time on dead ends.
useCases.salesBullet1: Lead scoring based on real behavior
useCases.marketingText: Understand which campaigns and channels drive actual revenue.
useCases.saasText: Identify at-risk accounts and expansion opportunities before it's too late.
useCases.ecommerceText: Score customers by lifetime value and target your best segments.

differentiation.title: Why Scorejam
differentiation.item1Text: Scores update as your data changes. No batch processing, no delays.
differentiation.item2Text: Built from the ground up with machine learning — not bolted on.
differentiation.item3Text: No setup headaches. Connect your data and get insights in minutes.

testimonials.title: What our users say
testimonials.quote1: Scorejam completely changed how we prioritize leads. We finally focus on what actually converts.
testimonials.quote2: Setup took 10 minutes. The insights we got in the first week were worth months of manual analysis.
testimonials.quote3: We reduced our sales cycle by 35% simply by scoring prospects with Scorejam. Game changer.

finalCta.title: Start focusing on what matters
finalCta.subtitle: Join the teams that stopped guessing and started scoring.

channels.title: From analysis to distribution
channels.hook: Your diagnosis becomes a touchpoint with your ecosystem.
channels.description: Scorejam turns every diagnosis into an engagement lever by intelligently distributing it across your channels. You don't just collect answers — you create useful interactions.

cookies.title: We value your privacy
cookies.description: We use cookies to enhance your experience, analyze site traffic, and personalize content. You can choose which cookies to accept.
cookies.essentialDesc: Required for the site to function properly
cookies.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how you use our site
cookies.marketingDesc: Used to deliver relevant ads and campaigns

signup.headline: Get started in minutes. Get your first insights immediately.
signup.subtext: No complex setup needed. Scorejam guides you to ask the right questions and quickly understand what matters.
signup.testimonial: We finally have answers we can actually use.
signup.securityNote: Your data is secure. No spam.
signup.seeResults: You'll see your first results in less than 5 minutes

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Scale when you're ready.
pricing.proDesc: For teams that need real results
pricing.creditsSubtitle: Boost your usage with credit packs
pricing.howCreditsText: Each scoring analysis uses credits. A simple questionnaire uses ~5 credits. A detailed diagnostic uses ~20 credits. Credits never expire.
pricing.valueItem1Text: Stop guessing. Know exactly where to focus.
pricing.valueItem2Text: From data to decisions in minutes, not weeks.
pricing.projectionTitle: What can you do with credits?
pricing.projectionItem3: Unlimited = score everything, all the time
pricing.faq1Q: Can I try Scorejam for free?
pricing.faq1A: Yes! The Starter plan is completely free with 50 credits per month. No credit card required.
pricing.faq2Q: What happens when I run out of credits?
pricing.faq2A: You can purchase additional credit packs anytime, or upgrade to Pro for more monthly credits.
pricing.faq3A: Absolutely. No commitment, no hidden fees. Cancel your Pro subscription anytime.
pricing.faq4A: Monthly credits reset each billing cycle, but purchased credit packs never expire.
pricing.faq5A: No. Zero setup fee, zero complexity. You're up and running in 10 minutes.

contactSales.headline: Let's build your custom plan.
contactSales.subtext: Our sales team will work with you to create a tailored solution that fits your organization's needs.
contactSales.feature1: Unlimited credits for your entire team
contactSales.reassurance: Our team typically responds within 24 hours. We'll schedule a call to understand your needs and propose a tailored plan.
contactSales.formSubtitle: Fill in your details and we'll get back to you shortly.
contactSales.ctaSub: No commitment — we'll reach out within 24h
contactSales.securityNote: Your data is secure. No spam.
contactSales.toast: Request received — we'll be in touch soon!

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Scorejam ("we", "us", or "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our platform.
privacy.section1Text:
We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, use our services, or contact us.

This includes:
- Account information: name, email address, company name, phone number
- Usage data: how you interact with our platform, diagnostics created, scores generated
- Device information: browser type, IP address, operating system
- Payment information: processed securely through our payment provider (we do not store card details)
privacy.section2Text:
We use the information we collect to:
- Provide, maintain, and improve our services
- Process transactions and send related information
- Send you technical notices, updates, and support messages
- Respond to your comments, questions, and requests
- Monitor and analyze trends, usage, and activities
- Personalize and improve your experience
privacy.section3Text:
We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share your information only in the following situations:
- With service providers who assist us in operating our platform
- To comply with legal obligations or respond to lawful requests
- To protect the rights, property, or safety of Scorejam, our users, or others
- With your consent or at your direction
privacy.section4Text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. This includes encryption in transit and at rest, regular security audits, and access controls.
privacy.section5Text: We retain your personal information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide you services. You may request deletion of your account and associated data at any time by contacting us.
privacy.section6Text:
Depending on your location, you may have the following rights regarding your personal data:
- Access: request a copy of your personal data
- Rectification: request correction of inaccurate data
- Erasure: request deletion of your data
- Portability: request transfer of your data
- Objection: object to the processing of your data

To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@scorejam.com.
privacy.section7Text: We use essential cookies to ensure the proper functioning of our platform. We may also use analytics cookies to understand how you use our service. You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings.
privacy.section8Text:
If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

Email: privacy@scorejam.com
Address: Scorejam SAS, Paris, France

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the Scorejam platform. By using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
terms.section1Text: By accessing or using Scorejam, you agree to these Terms and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, you may not use our services. If you are using our services on behalf of an organization, you represent that you have authority to bind that organization to these Terms.
terms.section2Text: Scorejam is an AI-powered scoring platform that enables users to create diagnostics, collect responses, and generate insights. We offer free and paid subscription plans with varying features and credit allowances.
terms.section3Text:
To use our services, you must create an account with accurate and complete information. You are responsible for:
- Maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials
- All activities that occur under your account
- Notifying us immediately of any unauthorized use
terms.section4Text:
Paid plans are billed in advance on a monthly basis. Credit packs are one-time purchases. All prices are in USD unless otherwise stated.
- You may cancel your subscription at any time, effective at the end of the current billing period
- Refunds are handled on a case-by-case basis
- We reserve the right to change pricing with 30 days notice
- Credits purchased through packs never expire
terms.section5Text:
You agree not to:
- Use the service for any unlawful purpose
- Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems
- Interfere with or disrupt the service
- Upload malicious content or code
- Resell or redistribute the service without authorization
- Use the service to collect data in violation of applicable privacy laws
terms.section6Text: The Scorejam platform, including its design, features, and content, is owned by Scorejam SAS and protected by intellectual property laws. You retain ownership of the data you submit to the platform. By using our service, you grant us a limited license to process your data solely to provide the service.
terms.section7Text: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Scorejam shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits or revenue. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid us in the 12 months preceding the claim.
terms.section8Text: We may suspend or terminate your access to the service at any time for violation of these Terms, with reasonable notice when possible. Upon termination, your right to use the service ceases immediately. You may request export of your data within 30 days of termination.
terms.section9Text: We may modify these Terms at any time. We will notify you of material changes via email or through the platform. Your continued use of the service after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the modified Terms.
terms.section10Text:
These Terms are governed by the laws of France. Any disputes shall be resolved in the competent courts of Paris, France.

For questions about these Terms, contact us at legal@scorejam.com.
